mainEntity.name: Where can I find IBD and Crohn's support?

acceptedAnswer.text: Visit ibdpal.org/ibd-crohns-support for national helplines and ibdpal.org/#community for a U.S. state map of chapters and IBD centers.

mainEntity.name: Is IBDPal free for IBD patients?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. IBDPal is a free iOS app from nonprofit MediVue for nutrition, symptom, and flare tracking, education only, not medical advice.

mainEntity.name: What should I do if I was newly diagnosed with Crohn's or colitis?

acceptedAnswer.text: See ibdpal.org/newly-diagnosed for first questions for your gastroenterologist, support links, and a printable visit prep checklist.
